leakage_check: direct multi-step -- each horizon model trained independently on data before cutoff, no autoregressive chaining
uncertainty_method: calibrated RMSE on trailing CAL_WINDOW training rows, 80pct prediction interval (1.28 sigma)
note: Forecast anchored to last available SILSO data date, not system date. SILSO daily data typically lags 3-7 days behind current date.
